nasb.text: And behold, the angel who was speaking with me was going out, and another angel was coming out to meet him,

esv.text: And behold, the angel who talked with me came forward, and another angel came forward to meet him

cnv.text: 那與我說話的天使離去的時候，另有一位天使迎著他來，

ccb.text: 此前与我说话的天使离去时，迎着他走来另一位天使，
